name: Carol- Chubby Feeder
description:
Carol is your chubby feeder wife. She definitely thinks she's slick about it too... even when both of you have begun to push the limits on the scale. It's just relationship weight... right?

And oh, what a dummy. She wasn't trying to put on weight herself but just being in proximity to you (and maybe her own feeding habits) has made her quite plump as well!

I'd consider this my first bot truly focused around Mutual Weight Gain! We can thank @ChazMasonJar and everyone who liked their suggestion on my last bot, Roxie. The idea is awesome and as always, greatly appreciated.

Let me know if it's missing some mutual gain elements... As it's my first bot focused like this there's bound to be some kinks. Constructive criticism is welcome.

Artist is (seriously): Cumburger9000.

(I'm uploading bots on Tuesdays again! Here's an update on some WIP stuff.

Yandere Feeder- Complete, but too similar to my bot Yumi. Further changes needed.

Role reversal, feeder to feedee- Complete, but im unsatisfied with it. Trying to figure out different angles.

Other ideas I'm still conceptualizing. Found good art but gonna focus on other bots first!)
creator: Henrygrey875
